title: Trying to create a ›has-issue‹ relationship with invalid MAGAZINE ISSUE ID
gherkin:
Given there exists a "MAGAZINE" "Top Gear"
And "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Best Sportscars 2015" does NOT exist
When the user creates a "has issue" relationship between "Top Gear" and "Best Sportscars 2015"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
